---
title: "Parenthood, Immigration and Further Education"
subtitle: "Analyses and Visualizations"
author: "Nate Breznau, Johannes Bonnes and Sylvia Rahn"
output:
  word_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: '1'
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    toc_depth: 1
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: '1'
---

NOTE: Linking error is necessary to compare SE across cycles. See ChatGPT output for a reccomendation for how to integrate it. 

## Setup   

```{r setup, echo = F, warning = F, message = F}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

packages <- c('tidyverse',
              'readr',
              'knitr',
              'here',
              'ggplot2',
              'ggrepel',
              'ragg',
              'survey',
              'kableExtra')

pacman::p_load(packages, character.only = T)

```

## Data

```{r }


df <- read_rds(here("Data", "df.RDS")) 
df2 <- read_rds(here("Data", "df2.RDS")) 

# basic or lower literacy
df2 <- df2 %>%
  mutate(reading_low = ifelse(literacy_level %in% c(0, 1), 1, 0),
         ALL = 1)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(reading_low = ifelse(literacy_level %in% c(0, 1), 1, 0),
         ALL = 1)

europe <- c("AUT", "BEL", "CHE", "CZE", "DEU", "DNK", "ESP", "EST", "FIN", "FRA", "GBR", "HRV", "HUN", "IRL", "ITA", "LTU", "LVA", "NOR", "POL", "PRT", "SVK", "SWE")

rich <- c("AUT", "BEL", "CHE", "DEU", "DNK", "ESP", "FIN", "FRA", "GBR", "IRL", "ITA", "NOR", "PRT", "SWE", "JPN", "CAN", "USA", "AUS", "NZL")

dfeurope <- subset(df, iso3c %in% europe)
df2europe <- subset(df2, iso3c %in% europe)

dfrich <- subset(df, iso3c %in% rich)
df2rich <- subset(df2, iso3c %in% rich)

dfde <- subset(df, iso3c == "DEU")
df2de <- subset(df2, iso3c == "DEU")

# for repeated measures means
df1_rep <- svrepdesign(
  weights = ~SPFWT0,
  repweights = df[, paste0("SPFWT", 1:80)],
  type = "Fay", rho = 0.5, mse = T, data = df)

df2_rep <- svrepdesign(
  weights = ~SPFWT0,
  repweights = df2[, paste0("SPFWT", 1:80)],
  type = "Fay", rho = 0.5, mse = T, data = df2)

df1_rep_eur <- svrepdesign(
  weights = ~SPFWT0,
  repweights = dfeurope[, paste0("SPFWT", 1:80)],
  type = "Fay", rho = 0.5, mse = T, data = dfeurope)

df2_rep_eur <- svrepdesign(
  weights = ~SPFWT0,
  repweights = df2europe[, paste0("SPFWT", 1:80)],
  type = "Fay", rho = 0.5, mse = T, data = df2europe)

df1_rep_rich <- svrepdesign(
  weights = ~SPFWT0,
  repweights = dfrich[, paste0("SPFWT", 1:80)],
  type = "Fay", rho = 0.5, mse = T, data = dfrich)

df2_rep_rich <- svrepdesign(
  weights = ~SPFWT0,
  repweights = df2rich[, paste0("SPFWT", 1:80)],
  type = "Fay", rho = 0.5, mse = T, data = df2rich)

df1_rep_de <- svrepdesign(
  weights = ~SPFWT0,
  repweights = dfde[, paste0("SPFWT", 1:80)],
  type = "Fay", rho = 0.5, mse = T, data = dfde)

df2_rep_de <- svrepdesign(
  weights = ~SPFWT0,
  repweights = df2de[, paste0("SPFWT", 1:80)],
  type = "Fay", rho = 0.5, mse = T, data = df2de)

pvlit <- paste0("PVLIT", 1:10)
pvnum <- paste0("PVNUM", 1:10)

# helper function to identify rep means/SD for sub-groups

source(here("Sub", "IRT_helper_groups_se_pop.R"))

```

## Fig A1. Immigrant Literacy 2012 and 2022

### Get rates for each country

Run the routine country_loop.R once and then simply load the results thereafter as the saved object plot_df.RData

```{r}
# this is the basic version, it does not calculate Rubin/Little SEs

source(here("Sub", "IRT_helper_groups.R"))

# source(here("Sub", "country_loop.R"))

load(here("Data", "plot_df.RData"))

```

### Build

```{r}

agg_png(here("Results", "Fig1A.png"), res = 144, height = 600, width = 800)

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = iso3c, y = change_lit, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Change in Literacy (Cycle 2, 2022 − Cycle 1, 2012)",
    title = "Change in Mean Literacy between PIAAC Cycles",
    caption = "NOTE: estimated with R survey package using repeated measures and population weights",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Immigrants" = "steelblue", "All adults" = "gray70")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 6, face = "italic"))

dev.off()

include_graphics(here("Results", "Fig1A.png"))

```


## Tbl A1. Immigration Increases 1990-2024

UN. 2024. “Total Number of Emigrants: People That Were Born in a Country and Now Live in Another Country” [CSV]. Our World In Data: United Nations Department of Economic and Social Affairs. https://ourworldindata.org/migration.

UN. 2024. "Share of The Population That Were Born in Another Country" [CSV]. Our World In Data: United Nations Department of Economic and Social Affairs. https://ourworldindata.org/grapher/migrant-stock-share

Files downloaded 2025/12/05


```{r}

df_un_mig <- read_csv(here("Data", "total-number-of-emigrants.filtered", "total-number-of-emigrants.csv"))

df_un_fb <- read_csv(here("Data", "migrant-stock-share.filtered", "migrant-stock-share.csv")) %>%
  subset(Year == 2024)

continents <- c("Africa","Asia","Europe","North America","Oceania","South America")

df_emig_out <- df_un_mig %>%
  filter(Entity %in% continents, Year %in% c(1990, 2024)) %>%
  select(Entity, Year, emigrants = `Total number of emigrants`) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Year, values_from = emigrants) %>%
  transmute(
    Entity,
    emigrants_2024 = `2024`,
    pct_change_1990_2024 = (`2024` - `1990`) / `1990` * 100
  ) %>%
  bind_rows(
    df_un_mig %>%
      filter(Entity %in% continents, Year %in% c(1990, 2024)) %>%
      group_by(Year) %>%
      summarise(emigrants = sum(`Total number of emigrants`, na.rm = TRUE), .groups="drop") %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = Year, values_from = emigrants) %>%
      transmute(
        Entity = "World",
        emigrants_2024 = `2024`,
        pct_change_1990_2024 = (`2024` - `1990`) / `1990` * 100
      )
  )

source(here("Sub", "pop_2024.R"))

# this does not include Oceania, quick Google info 46 mil in 2024

df_pop_2024[7,1] <- "Oceania"
df_pop_2024[7,2] <- 46000000

df_2A <- df_emig_out %>%
  left_join(df_pop_2024, by = "Entity")

df_2A <- df_2A %>%
  mutate(pct_emig_2024 = round(100*(emigrants_2024/population_2024),1))

df_2A <- df_2A %>%
  mutate(pct_fb_2024 = case_when(Entity == "Africa" ~ df_un_fb$`Share of the population that was born in another country`[df_un_fb$Entity == "Africa"],
                                 Entity == "Asia" ~ df_un_fb$`Share of the population that was born in another country`[df_un_fb$Entity == "Asia"],
                                 Entity == "Europe" ~ df_un_fb$`Share of the population that was born in another country`[df_un_fb$Entity == "Western Europe (UN)"],
                                 Entity == "North America" ~ df_un_fb$`Share of the population that was born in another country`[df_un_fb$Entity == "North America"],
                                 Entity == "Oceania" ~ df_un_fb$`Share of the population that was born in another country`[df_un_fb$Entity == "Oceania"],
                                 Entity == "South America" ~ df_un_fb$`Share of the population that was born in another country`[df_un_fb$Entity == "South America"],
                                 Entity == "World" ~ df_un_fb$`Share of the population that was born in another country`[df_un_fb$Entity == "World"]),
         pct_fb_2024 = round(pct_fb_2024, 1)
  )

rm(df_un_mig, df_emig_out, df_pop_2024, df_un_fb)

write.csv(df_2A, here("Results", "TS2.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

rm(df_2A)

```

## Table S1. Descriptives

Drop cases of those still in formal education. Add footnote to table that `r sum(df2$ed_currently == 1, na.rm = T)`.

### All

```{r}

table_1_all <- df2 %>%
  subset(ed_currently != 1) %>%
    mutate(
    ed_primary   = ifelse(ed3 == 1, 1, 0),
    ed_secondary = ifelse(ed3 == 2, 1, 0),
    ed_tertiary  = ifelse(ed3 == 3, 1, 0),
    missing = case_when(is.na(skill_reading) | is.na(NFE12) | is.na(FORBORN) | is.na(children) | is.na(FORLANG) | is.na(ed3) | is.na(ed_currently) ~ 1,
                        .default = NA)
    ) %>%
  select(-ed3) %>%
  select(iso3c, skill_reading, NFE12, female, FORBORN, children, FORLANG, ed_primary, ed_secondary, ed_tertiary, missing, aweight)

  
# drop countries that do not have all variables
valid_countries <- table_1_all %>%
  group_by(iso3c) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(!is.na(.)))) %>%
  filter(across(-iso3c, ~ . > 0)) %>%
  pull(iso3c)

table_1_all <- table_1_all %>%
  filter(iso3c %in% valid_countries)

table_1outa <- table_1_all %>%
  select(-iso3c) %>%
  summarise(across(
    everything(),
    list(
      mean  = ~ mean(., na.rm = TRUE),
      wmean = ~ weighted.mean(., aweight, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd    = ~ sd(., na.rm = TRUE),
      min   = ~ min(., na.rm = TRUE),
      max   = ~ max(., na.rm = TRUE),
      n     = ~ sum(!is.na(.))
    ),
    .names = "{.col}__{.fn}"
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = c("variable", ".value"),
    names_sep = "__"
  ) %>%
  mutate(variable = case_when(
    variable == "skill_reading"   ~ "Literacy Skills",
    variable == "NFE12"           ~ "ALE Participation",
    variable == "FORBORN"         ~ "Foreign-Born",
    variable == "children"        ~ "Has Children",
    variable == "FORLANG"         ~ "Non-Native Speaker",
    variable == "ed_primary"      ~ "Primary Education",
    variable == "ed_secondary"    ~ "Secondary Education",
    variable == "ed_tertiary"     ~ "Tertiary Education",
    variable == "missing"         ~ "Listwise Missing Cases",
    TRUE ~ variable
  ))

# Save as HTML
table_1outa %>%
  select(variable, mean, wmean, sd, min, max, n) %>%
  kable("html", digits = 2, caption = "Descriptive Statistics with Weighted Means") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover")) %>%
  save_kable(here("Results", "table_S1.html"))


table_1outa  %>% kable("html", digits = 2, caption = "Descriptive Statistics") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))

write.csv(
  table_1outa,
  file = here("Results", "TS1.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)


```

### Women

```{r}

table_1 <- df2 %>%
  subset(female == 1 & !is.na(female) & ed_currently != 1) %>%
    mutate(
    ed_primary   = ifelse(ed3 == 1, 1, 0),
    ed_secondary = ifelse(ed3 == 2, 1, 0),
    ed_tertiary  = ifelse(ed3 == 3, 1, 0),
    missing = case_when(is.na(skill_reading) | is.na(NFE12) | is.na(FORBORN) | is.na(children) | is.na(FORLANG) | is.na(ed3) | is.na(ed_currently) ~ 1,
                        .default = NA)
    ) %>%
  select(-ed3) %>%
  select(iso3c, skill_reading, NFE12, FORBORN, children, FORLANG, ed_primary, ed_secondary, ed_tertiary, missing, aweight)

  
# drop countries that do not have all variables
valid_countries <- table_1 %>%
  group_by(iso3c) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(!is.na(.)))) %>%
  filter(across(-iso3c, ~ . > 0)) %>%
  pull(iso3c)

table_1 <- table_1 %>%
  filter(iso3c %in% valid_countries)

table_1out <- table_1 %>%
  select(-iso3c) %>%
  summarise(across(
    everything(),
    list(
      mean  = ~ mean(., na.rm = TRUE),
      wmean = ~ weighted.mean(., aweight, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd    = ~ sd(., na.rm = TRUE),
      min   = ~ min(., na.rm = TRUE),
      max   = ~ max(., na.rm = TRUE),
      n     = ~ sum(!is.na(.))
    ),
    .names = "{.col}__{.fn}"
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = c("variable", ".value"),
    names_sep = "__"
  ) %>%
  mutate(variable = case_when(
    variable == "skill_reading"   ~ "Literacy Skills",
    variable == "NFE12"           ~ "ALE Participation",
    variable == "FORBORN"         ~ "Foreign-Born",
    variable == "children"        ~ "Has Children",
    variable == "FORLANG"         ~ "Non-Native Speaker",
    variable == "ed_primary"      ~ "Primary Education",
    variable == "ed_secondary"    ~ "Secondary Education",
    variable == "ed_tertiary"     ~ "Tertiary Education",
    variable == "missing"         ~ "Listwise Missing Cases",
    TRUE ~ variable
  ))

# Save as HTML
table_1out %>%
  select(variable, mean, wmean, sd, min, max, n) %>%
  kable("html", digits = 2, caption = "Descriptive Statistics with Weighted Means") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover")) %>%
  save_kable(here("Results", "table_S1.html"))


table_1out  %>% kable("html", digits = 2, caption = "Descriptive Statistics") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))

write.csv(
  table_1out,
  file = here("Results", "TS1f.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)


```

### Men

```{r}

table_1a <- df2 %>%
  subset(female == 0 & !is.na(female) & ed_currently != 1) %>%
    mutate(
    ed_primary   = ifelse(ed3 == 1, 1, 0),
    ed_secondary = ifelse(ed3 == 2, 1, 0),
    ed_tertiary  = ifelse(ed3 == 3, 1, 0),
    missing = case_when(is.na(skill_reading) | is.na(NFE12) | is.na(FORBORN) | is.na(children) | is.na(FORLANG) | is.na(ed3) | is.na(ed_currently) ~ 1,
                        .default = NA)
    ) %>%
  select(-ed3) %>%
  select(iso3c, skill_reading, NFE12, FORBORN, children, FORLANG, ed_primary, ed_secondary, ed_tertiary, missing, aweight)

  
# drop countries that do not have all variables
valid_countries <- table_1a %>%
  group_by(iso3c) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(!is.na(.)))) %>%
  filter(across(-iso3c, ~ . > 0)) %>%
  pull(iso3c)

table_1a <- table_1a %>%
  filter(iso3c %in% valid_countries)

table_1outa <- table_1a %>%
  select(-iso3c) %>%
  summarise(across(
    everything(),
    list(
      mean  = ~ mean(., na.rm = TRUE),
      wmean = ~ weighted.mean(., aweight, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd    = ~ sd(., na.rm = TRUE),
      min   = ~ min(., na.rm = TRUE),
      max   = ~ max(., na.rm = TRUE),
      n     = ~ sum(!is.na(.))
    ),
    .names = "{.col}__{.fn}"
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = c("variable", ".value"),
    names_sep = "__"
  ) %>%
  mutate(variable = case_when(
    variable == "skill_reading"   ~ "Literacy Skills",
    variable == "NFE12"           ~ "ALE Participation",
    variable == "FORBORN"         ~ "Foreign-Born",
    variable == "children"        ~ "Has Children",
    variable == "FORLANG"         ~ "Non-Native Speaker",
    variable == "ed_primary"      ~ "Primary Education",
    variable == "ed_secondary"    ~ "Secondary Education",
    variable == "ed_tertiary"     ~ "Tertiary Education",
    variable == "missing"         ~ "Listwise Missing Cases",
    TRUE ~ variable
  ))

# Save as HTML
table_1outa %>%
  select(variable, mean, wmean, sd, min, max, n) %>%
  kable("html", digits = 2, caption = "Descriptive Statistics with Weighted Means") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover")) %>%
  save_kable(here("Results", "table_S1.html"))

table_1outa  %>% kable("html", digits = 2, caption = "Descriptive Statistics") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))

write.csv(
  table_1outa,
  file = here("Results", "TS1m.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)


```

### Foreign-born, non-native

```{r}


# Helper function to summarize a group
summarize_group <- function(data) {
  data %>%
    mutate(
      ed_primary   = ifelse(ed3 == 1, 1, 0),
      ed_secondary = ifelse(ed3 == 2, 1, 0),
      ed_tertiary  = ifelse(ed3 == 3, 1, 0)
    ) %>%
    summarise(across(
      c(skill_reading, NFE12, FORBORN, children, FORLANG,
        ed_primary, ed_secondary, ed_tertiary, ed_currently),
      list(
        mean = ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        wmean = ~ weighted.mean(.x, aweight, na.rm = TRUE)
      ),
      .names = "{.col}__{.fn}"
    )) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      everything(),
      names_to = c("variable", ".value"),
      names_sep = "__"
    )
}

# Summarize females
female_sum <- df2 %>%
  filter(female == 1, FORLANG == 1, FORBORN == 1) %>%
  summarize_group()

# Summarize males
male_sum <- df2 %>%
  filter(female == 0, FORLANG == 1, FORBORN == 1) %>%
  summarize_group()

# Combine both into one table
table_summary <- female_sum %>%
  rename(female_mean = mean, female_wmean = wmean) %>%
  full_join(
    male_sum %>%
      rename(male_mean = mean, male_wmean = wmean),
    by = "variable"
  ) %>%
  mutate(variable = case_when(
    variable == "skill_reading"   ~ "Literacy Skills",
    variable == "NFE12"           ~ "ALE Participation",
    variable == "FORBORN"         ~ "Foreign-Born",
    variable == "children"        ~ "Has Children",
    variable == "FORLANG"         ~ "Non-Native Speaker",
    variable == "ed_currently"    ~ "Currently in Education",
    variable == "ed_primary"      ~ "Primary Education",
    variable == "ed_secondary"    ~ "Secondary Education",
    variable == "ed_tertiary"     ~ "Tertiary Education",
    TRUE ~ variable
  ))

# Create formatted table
table_output <- table_summary %>%
  kable("html", digits = 2, caption = "Means and Weighted Means by Gender") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))

# Save to HTML file
save_kable(table_output, file = here::here("Results", "Table_S1ag.html"))

# Print table to viewer
table_output


```

## Fig A2. Intersectionality of Literacy

### Define all groups

#### All countries

```{r}

# helper defined in IRT_helper_groups.R
calc_groups_pv(
    df1_rep = df1_rep,
    df2_rep = df2_rep,
    pvlit   = pvlit,
    pvnum   = NA,
    group_vars   = c("ALL", "male", "female", "male_not", "male_fb", "female_not", "female_fb", "male_not_natlang", "male_not_notnatlang", "male_fb_natlang", "male_fb_notnatlang", "female_not_natlang", "female_not_notnatlang", "female_fb_natlang", "female_fb_notnatlang", "male_not_natlang_child", "male_not_notnatlang_child", "male_fb_natlang_child", "male_fb_notnatlang_child", "male_not_natlang_nochild", "male_not_notnatlang_nochild", "male_fb_natlang_nochild", "male_fb_notnatlang_nochild", "female_not_natlang_child", "female_not_notnatlang_child", "female_fb_natlang_child", "female_fb_notnatlang_child", "female_not_natlang_nochild", "female_not_notnatlang_nochild", "female_fb_natlang_nochild", "female_fb_notnatlang_nochild")
  )

# combine all mean and se objects into a df
source(here("Sub", "combine_g_objects.R"))

# combine all pct of groups with PIAAC level at 1 or below
source(here("Sub", "combine_g_objects_pct.R"))


# remove raw objects
rm(list = ls(pattern = "^g[0-9]+_(mean|se)_(lit|num)_df[12]$"))
rm(list = ls(pattern = "^g[0-9]+_(mean|se)_(lit|num)_diff$"))
rm(list = ls(pattern = "^g[0-9]+_(pct)_lit01_df[12]$"))  # pct is literacy-only so far (num can be calculated the same way)

# give unique naming
df_lit_all <- df_lit
df_num_all <- df_num
df_pct_level_1_or_less_all <- df_pct_level_1_or_less

```

#### Rich countries only

These are destination countries

```{r}
calc_groups_pv(
    df1_rep = df1_rep_rich,
    df2_rep = df2_rep_rich,
    pvlit   = pvlit,
    pvnum   = NA,
    group_vars   = c("ALL", "male", "female", "male_not", "male_fb", "female_not", "female_fb", "male_not_natlang", "male_not_notnatlang", "male_fb_natlang", "male_fb_notnatlang", "female_not_natlang", "female_not_notnatlang", "female_fb_natlang", "female_fb_notnatlang", "male_not_natlang_child", "male_not_notnatlang_child", "male_fb_natlang_child", "male_fb_notnatlang_child", "male_not_natlang_nochild", "male_not_notnatlang_nochild", "male_fb_natlang_nochild", "male_fb_notnatlang_nochild", "female_not_natlang_child", "female_not_notnatlang_child", "female_fb_natlang_child", "female_fb_notnatlang_child", "female_not_natlang_nochild", "female_not_notnatlang_nochild", "female_fb_natlang_nochild", "female_fb_notnatlang_nochild")
  )


source(here("Sub", "combine_g_objects.R"))

# PIAAC level at 1 or below
source(here("Sub", "combine_g_objects_pct.R"))


# remove raw objects
rm(list = ls(pattern = "^g[0-9]+_(mean|se)_lit_df[12]$"))
rm(list = ls(pattern = "^g[0-9]+_(pct|se)_lit01_df[12]$"))

# unique names
df_lit_rich <- df_lit
df_pct_level_1_or_less_rich <- df_pct_level_1_or_less
```

#### Europe only

```{r}

calc_groups_pv(
    df1_rep = df1_rep_eur,
    df2_rep = df2_rep_eur,
    pvlit   = pvlit,
    pvnum   = NA,
    group_vars   = c("ALL", "male", "female", "male_not", "male_fb", "female_not", "female_fb", "male_not_natlang", "male_not_notnatlang", "male_fb_natlang", "male_fb_notnatlang", "female_not_natlang", "female_not_notnatlang", "female_fb_natlang", "female_fb_notnatlang", "male_not_natlang_child", "male_not_notnatlang_child", "male_fb_natlang_child", "male_fb_notnatlang_child", "male_not_natlang_nochild", "male_not_notnatlang_nochild", "male_fb_natlang_nochild", "male_fb_notnatlang_nochild", "female_not_natlang_child", "female_not_notnatlang_child", "female_fb_natlang_child", "female_fb_notnatlang_child", "female_not_natlang_nochild", "female_not_notnatlang_nochild", "female_fb_natlang_nochild", "female_fb_notnatlang_nochild")
  )

source(here("Sub", "combine_g_objects.R"))
source(here("Sub", "combine_g_objects_pct.R"))

rm(list = ls(pattern = "^g[0-9]+_(mean|se)_lit_df[12]$"))
rm(list = ls(pattern = "^g[0-9]+_(pct|se)_lit01_df[12]$"))

df_lit_eur <- df_lit
df_pct_level_1_or_less_eur <- df_pct_level_1_or_less

```

#### Germany only

This is for a blog post predecessor to the study in the GrundbildungsPFADE project out of curiosity 

```{r}
group_vars = c("ALL", "male", "female", "male_not", "male_fb", "female_not", "female_fb", "male_not_natlang", "male_not_notnatlang", "male_fb_natlang", "male_fb_notnatlang", "female_not_natlang", "female_not_notnatlang", "female_fb_natlang", "female_fb_notnatlang", "male_not_natlang_child", "male_not_notnatlang_child", "male_fb_natlang_child", "male_fb_notnatlang_child", "male_not_natlang_nochild", "male_not_notnatlang_nochild", "male_fb_natlang_nochild", "male_fb_notnatlang_nochild", "female_not_natlang_child", "female_not_notnatlang_child", "female_fb_natlang_child", "female_fb_notnatlang_child", "female_not_natlang_nochild", "female_not_notnatlang_nochild", "female_fb_natlang_nochild", "female_fb_notnatlang_nochild")
               
calc_groups_pv(
    df1_rep = df1_rep_de, 
    df2_rep = df2_rep_de,
    pvlit   = pvlit,
    pvnum   = pvnum,
    group_vars = group_vars)

source(here("Sub", "combine_g_objects.R"))
source(here("Sub", "combine_g_objects_pct.R"))

rm(list = ls(pattern = "^g[0-9]+_(mean|se)_(lit|num)_df[12]$"))
rm(list = ls(pattern = "^g[0-9]+_(mean|se)_(lit|num)_diff$"))
rm(list = ls(pattern = "^g[0-9]+_(pct|se)_lit01_df[12]$"))

df_lit_de <- df_lit
df_num_de <- df_num
df_pct_level_1_or_less_de <- df_pct_level_1_or_less

rm(df_lit, df_num, df_pct_level_1_or_less)
```

### Plot

#### Prep dfs

```{r}

# All
df_a2 <- df_lit_all %>%
  filter(cycle %in% c("df2", "Cycle 2", "Cycle 2 (2022)", "2022")) %>%
  select(group_label, mean) %>%
  drop_na(mean)

# Rich
df_a2_rich <- df_lit_rich %>%
  filter(cycle %in% c("df2", "Cycle 2", "Cycle 2 (2022)", "2022")) %>%
  select(group_label, mean) %>%
  drop_na(mean)

# Europe
df_a2_eur <- df_lit_eur %>%
  filter(cycle %in% c("df2", "Cycle 2", "Cycle 2 (2022)", "2022")) %>%
  select(group_label, mean) %>%
  drop_na(mean)

# DE
df_a2_de <- df_lit_de %>%
  filter(cycle %in% c("df2", "Cycle 2", "Cycle 2 (2022)", "2022")) %>%
  select(group_label, mean) %>%
  drop_na(mean)

df_a2num_de <- df_num_de %>%
  filter(cycle %in% c("df2", "Cycle 2", "Cycle 2 (2022)", "2022")) %>%
  select(group_label, mean) %>%
  drop_na(mean)

# ChatGPT made this cool hierarchy routine
parent_of <- function(label) {
  if (label == "ALL") return(NA_character_)
  if (!str_detect(label, "_")) return("ALL")
  sub("_[^_]+$", "", label)
}

depth_of <- function(label) {
  if (label == "ALL") return(0L)
  str_count(label, "_") + 1L
}

df_a2 <- df_a2 %>%
  mutate(
    depth = vapply(group_label, depth_of, integer(1)),
    parent = vapply(group_label, parent_of, character(1))
  )

df_a2_rich <- df_a2_rich %>%
  mutate(
    depth = vapply(group_label, depth_of, integer(1)),
    parent = vapply(group_label, parent_of, character(1))
  )

df_a2_eur <- df_a2_eur %>%
  mutate(
    depth = vapply(group_label, depth_of, integer(1)),
    parent = vapply(group_label, parent_of, character(1))
  )

df_a2_de <- df_a2_de %>%
  mutate(
    depth = vapply(group_label, depth_of, integer(1)),
    parent = vapply(group_label, parent_of, character(1))
  )

df_a2num_de <- df_a2num_de %>%
  mutate(
    depth = vapply(group_label, depth_of, integer(1)),
    parent = vapply(group_label, parent_of, character(1))
  )

# make a label map vector instead of using case_match each time

plot_label_map <- c(
  "ALL" = "Entire Population",
  "male" = "Male",
  "female" = "Female",
  "male_not" = "Native-born",
  "female_not" = "Native-born",
  "male_fb" = "Foreign-born",
  "female_fb" = "Foreign-born",
  "male_not_natlang" = "Native",
  "male_fb_natlang" = "Native",
  "female_not_natlang" = "Native",
  "female_fb_natlang" = "Native",
  "male_not_notnatlang" = "Non-native",
  "male_fb_notnatlang" = "Non-native",
  "female_not_notnatlang" = "Non-native",
  "female_fb_notnatlang" = "Non-native",
  "male_not_natlang_child" = "Parent",
  "male_fb_natlang_child" = "Parent",
  "female_not_natlang_child" = "Parent",
  "female_fb_natlang_child" = "Parent",
  "male_not_notnatlang_child" = "Parent",
  "male_fb_notnatlang_child" = "Parent",
  "female_not_notnatlang_child" = "Parent",
  "female_fb_notnatlang_child" = "Parent",
  "male_not_natlang_nochild" = "Childless",
  "male_fb_natlang_nochild" = "Childless",
  "female_not_natlang_nochild" = "Childless",
  "female_fb_natlang_nochild" = "Childless",
  "male_not_notnatlang_nochild" = "Childless",
  "male_fb_notnatlang_nochild" = "Childless",
  "female_not_notnatlang_nochild" = "Childless",
  "female_fb_notnatlang_nochild" = "Childless"
)


# Add group labels for plotting
df_a2 <- df_a2 %>%
  mutate(plot_label = plot_label_map[group_label])

df_a2_rich <- df_a2_rich %>%
  mutate(plot_label = plot_label_map[group_label])

df_a2_eur <- df_a2_eur %>%
  mutate(plot_label = plot_label_map[group_label])

df_a2_de <- df_a2_de %>%
  mutate(plot_label = plot_label_map[group_label])

df_a2num_de <- df_a2num_de %>%
  mutate(plot_label = plot_label_map[group_label])

# organize data for plotting
labels <- df_a2$group_label

children_map <- df_a2 %>%
  select(group_label, parent) %>%
  filter(!is.na(parent), parent %in% labels) %>%
  arrange(parent, group_label) %>%
  group_by(parent) %>%
  summarise(children = list(group_label), .groups = "drop") %>%
  deframe()

children_map_rich <- df_a2_rich %>%
  select(group_label, parent) %>%
  filter(!is.na(parent), parent %in% labels) %>%
  arrange(parent, group_label) %>%
  group_by(parent) %>%
  summarise(children = list(group_label), .groups = "drop") %>%
  deframe()

children_map_eur <- df_a2_eur %>%
  select(group_label, parent) %>%
  filter(!is.na(parent), parent %in% labels) %>%
  arrange(parent, group_label) %>%
  group_by(parent) %>%
  summarise(children = list(group_label), .groups = "drop") %>%
  deframe()

children_map_de <- df_a2_de %>%
  select(group_label, parent) %>%
  filter(!is.na(parent), parent %in% labels) %>%
  arrange(parent, group_label) %>%
  group_by(parent) %>%
  summarise(children = list(group_label), .groups = "drop") %>%
  deframe()

children_map_de_num <- df_a2num_de %>%
  select(group_label, parent) %>%
  filter(!is.na(parent), parent %in% labels) %>%
  arrange(parent, group_label) %>%
  group_by(parent) %>%
  summarise(children = list(group_label), .groups = "drop") %>%
  deframe()

# Ensure every label is a key (even if it has no children)
for (lab in labels) if (is.null(children_map[[lab]])) children_map[[lab]] <- character(0)

for (lab in labels) if (is.null(children_map_rich[[lab]])) children_map_rich[[lab]] <- character(0)

for (lab in labels) if (is.null(children_map_eur[[lab]])) children_map_eur[[lab]] <- character(0)

for (lab in labels) if (is.null(children_map_de[[lab]])) children_map_de[[lab]] <- character(0)

for (lab in labels) if (is.null(children_map_de_num[[lab]])) children_map_de_num[[lab]] <- character(0)

max_depth <- max(df_a2$depth, na.rm = TRUE)
max_depth_rich <- max(df_a2_rich$depth, na.rm = TRUE)
max_depth_eur <- max(df_a2_eur$depth, na.rm = TRUE)
max_depth_de <- max(df_a2_de$depth, na.rm = TRUE)
max_depth_de_num <- max(df_a2num_de$depth, na.rm = TRUE)

# Assign x recursively 
x_pos <- setNames(rep(NA_real_, length(labels)), labels)


assign_positions <- function(node, depth, x) {
  x_pos[[node]] <<- x
  ch <- children_map[[node]]
  if (length(ch) == 2) {
    # symmetric left/right offset that shrinks with depth
    offset <- 2^(max_depth - depth - 1)
    assign_positions(ch[1], depth + 1, x - offset)
    assign_positions(ch[2], depth + 1, x + offset)
  } else if (length(ch) == 1) {
    # single child straight below (although this case doesn't exist in these groupings)
    assign_positions(ch[1], depth + 1, x)
  }
}

assign_positions_rich <- function(node, depth, x) {
  x_pos[[node]] <<- x
  ch <- children_map_rich[[node]]
  if (length(ch) == 2) {
    # symmetric left/right offset that shrinks with depth
    offset <- 2^(max_depth_rich - depth - 1)
    assign_positions_rich(ch[1], depth + 1, x - offset)
    assign_positions_rich(ch[2], depth + 1, x + offset)
  } else if (length(ch) == 1) {
    # single child straight below (although this case doesn't exist in these groupings)
    assign_positions_rich(ch[1], depth + 1, x)
  }
}

assign_positions_eur <- function(node, depth, x) {
  x_pos[[node]] <<- x
  ch <- children_map_eur[[node]]
  if (length(ch) == 2) {
    # symmetric left/right offset that shrinks with depth
    offset <- 2^(max_depth_eur - depth - 1)
    assign_positions_eur(ch[1], depth + 1, x - offset)
    assign_positions_eur(ch[2], depth + 1, x + offset)
  } else if (length(ch) == 1) {
    # single child straight below (although this case doesn't exist in these groupings)
    assign_positions_eur(ch[1], depth + 1, x)
  }
}

# DE
assign_positions_de <- function(node, depth, x) {
  x_pos[[node]] <<- x
  ch <- children_map_de[[node]]                 
  if (length(ch) == 2) {
    offset <- 2^(max_depth_de - depth - 1)      
    assign_positions_de(ch[1], depth + 1, x - offset)
    assign_positions_de(ch[2], depth + 1, x + offset)
  } else if (length(ch) == 1) {
    assign_positions_de(ch[1], depth + 1, x)
  }
}

assign_positions_de_num <- function(node, depth, x) {
  x_pos[[node]] <<- x
  ch <- children_map_de_num[[node]]                 
  if (length(ch) == 2) {
    offset <- 2^(max_depth_de_num - depth - 1)      
    assign_positions_de_num(ch[1], depth + 1, x - offset)
    assign_positions_de_num(ch[2], depth + 1, x + offset)
  } else if (length(ch) == 1) {
    assign_positions_de_num(ch[1], depth + 1, x)
  }
}

root <- if ("ALL" %in% labels) "ALL" else df_a2 %>% arrange(depth) %>% slice(1) %>% pull(group_label)
assign_positions(root, 0L, 0)

root_rich <- if ("ALL" %in% labels) "ALL" else df_a2_rich %>% arrange(depth) %>% slice(1) %>% pull(group_label)
assign_positions_rich(root_rich, 0L, 0)

root_eur <- if ("ALL" %in% labels) "ALL" else df_a2_eur %>% arrange(depth) %>% slice(1) %>% pull(group_label)
assign_positions_eur(root_eur, 0L, 0)

root_de <- if ("ALL" %in% labels) "ALL" else df_a2_de %>% arrange(depth) %>% slice(1) %>% pull(group_label)
assign_positions_de(root_de, 0L, 0)

root_de_num <- if ("ALL" %in% labels) "ALL" else df_a2num_de %>% arrange(depth) %>% slice(1) %>% pull(group_label)
assign_positions_de_num(root_de_num, 0L, 0)

# Top is y=0, then working down (by going up in count)
df_a2 <- df_a2 %>%
  mutate(
    x = unname(x_pos[group_label]),
    y = depth
  )

df_a2_rich <- df_a2_rich %>%
  mutate(
    x = unname(x_pos[group_label]),
    y = depth
  )

df_a2_eur <- df_a2_eur %>%
  mutate(
    x = unname(x_pos[group_label]),
    y = depth
  )

df_a2_de <- df_a2_de %>%
  mutate(
    x = unname(x_pos[group_label]),
    y = depth
  )

df_a2num_de <- df_a2num_de %>%
  mutate(
    x = unname(x_pos[group_label]),
    y = depth
  )

#conmecting lines
edges <- df_a2 %>%
  #mutate(y = y + 1) %>%
  select(child = group_label, xend = x, yend = y, parent) %>%
  left_join(df_a2 %>% select(parent = group_label, x, y),
            by = "parent", relationship = "many-to-one") %>%
  filter(!is.na(parent))

edges_rich <- df_a2_rich %>%
  #mutate(y = y + 1) %>%
  select(child = group_label, xend = x, yend = y, parent) %>%
  left_join(df_a2_rich %>% select(parent = group_label, x, y),
            by = "parent", relationship = "many-to-one") %>%
  filter(!is.na(parent))

edges_eur <- df_a2_eur %>%
  #mutate(y = y + 1) %>%
  select(child = group_label, xend = x, yend = y, parent) %>%
  left_join(df_a2_eur %>% select(parent = group_label, x, y),
            by = "parent", relationship = "many-to-one") %>%
  filter(!is.na(parent))

# DE
edges_de <- df_a2_de %>%
  #mutate(y = y + 1) %>%
  select(child = group_label, xend = x, yend = y, parent) %>%
  left_join(df_a2_de %>% select(parent = group_label, x, y),
            by = "parent", relationship = "many-to-one") %>%
  filter(!is.na(parent))

edges_de_num <- df_a2num_de %>%
  #mutate(y = y + 1) %>%
  select(child = group_label, xend = x, yend = y, parent) %>%
  left_join(df_a2num_de %>% select(parent = group_label, x, y),
            by = "parent", relationship = "many-to-one") %>%
  filter(!is.na(parent))

```

#### A. All

```{r}

agg_png(here("Results", "Fig2A_A.png"), res = 576, width = 3200, height = 1900)

p <- ggplot(df_a2, aes(x = x, y = y, color = mean)) +
  geom_segment(
    data = edges,
    aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend),
    color = "grey75",
    linetype = "dotted"
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(mean, 0)), 
    vjust = -2.2, 
    size = 2.2, 
    color = "black"
    ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = plot_label),
    vjust = 3,
    size = 1.7,
    color = "black"
    ) +
  annotate("text", x = 12, y = 0, 
           label = "A. All", size = 4) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(name = "Literacy") +
  scale_y_reverse(
    breaks = 0:4,
    labels = c("All", "Sex", "Migration", "Language", "Parenthood"),
    limits = c(4.1,-0.1)
    ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "Group Splits",
    title = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )

p

dev.off()

include_graphics(here("Results", "Fig2A_A.png"))

```

#### B. Rich

```{r}

agg_png(here("Results", "Fig2A_B.png"), res = 576, width = 3200, height = 2250)

p <- ggplot(df_a2_rich, aes(x = x, y = y, color = mean)) +
  geom_segment(
    data = edges_rich,
    aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend),
    color = "grey75",
    linetype = "dotted"
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(mean, 0)), 
    vjust = -2.2, 
    size = 2.2, 
    color = "black"
    ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = plot_label),
    vjust = 3,
    size = 1.7,
    color = "black"
    ) +
  annotate("text", x = 12, y = 0, 
           label = "B. Rich", size = 4) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(name = "Literacy") +
  scale_y_reverse(
    breaks = 0:4,
    labels = c("All", "Sex", "Migration", "Language", "Parenthood"),
    limits = c(4.1,-0.1)
    ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "Group Splits",
    title = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )

p

dev.off()

include_graphics(here("Results", "Fig2A_B.png"))

```

#### C. Europe

```{r}

agg_png(here("Results", "Fig2A_C.png"), res = 576, width = 3200, height = 1900)

p <- ggplot(df_a2_eur, aes(x = x, y = y, color = mean)) +
  geom_segment(
    data = edges_eur,
    aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend),
    color = "grey75",
    linetype = "dotted"
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(mean, 0)), 
    vjust = -2.2, 
    size = 2.2, 
    color = "black"
    ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = plot_label),
    vjust = 3,
    size = 1.7,
    color = "black"
    ) +
  annotate("text", x = 12, y = 0, 
           label = "C. Europe", size = 4) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(name = "Literacy") +
  scale_y_reverse(
    breaks = 0:4,
    labels = c("All", "Sex", "Migration", "Language", "Parenthood"),
    limits = c(4.1,-0.1)
    ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "Group Splits",
    title = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )

p

dev.off()

include_graphics(here("Results", "Fig2A_C.png"))

```

#### DE ONLY

##### Lit English Labels

```{r}

agg_png(here("Results", "Fig2A_D.png"), res = 576, width = 3200, height = 2250)

pde <- ggplot(df_a2_de, aes(x = x, y = y, color = mean)) +
  geom_segment(
    data = edges_de,
    aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend),
    color = "grey75",
    linetype = "dotted"
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(mean, 0)), 
    vjust = -2.2, 
    size = 2.2, 
    color = "black"
    ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = plot_label),
    vjust = 3,
    size = 1.7,
    color = "black"
    ) +
  annotate("text", x = 12, y = 0, 
           label = "D. DEU", size = 4) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(name = "Literacy") +
  scale_y_reverse(
    breaks = 0:4,
    labels = c("All", "Sex", "Migration", "Language", "Parenthood"),
    limits = c(4.1,-0.1)
    ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "Group Splits",
    title = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )

pde

dev.off()

include_graphics(here("Results", "Fig2A_D.png"))

```

##### Lit DE Labels

```{r}

agg_png(here("Results", "Fig2A_D_Deutsch.png"), res = 576, width = 3200, height = 2250)

df_a2_de_X <- df_a2_de %>%
  mutate(plot_label = case_match(plot_label,
                                 "Male" ~ "Männer",
                                 "Female" ~ "Frauen",
                                 "Native-born" ~ "DE geboren",
                                 "Foreign-born" ~ "Ausl. geboren",
                                 "Native" ~ "Erstsprache",
                                 "Non-native" ~ "nicht Erstsprache",
                                 "Parent" ~ "Mit",
                                 "Childless" ~ "Ohne")
  )

pdex <- ggplot(df_a2_de_X, aes(x = x, y = y, color = mean)) +
  geom_segment(
    data = edges_de,
    aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend),
    color = "grey75",
    linetype = "dotted"
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(mean, 0)), 
    vjust = -2.2, 
    size = 2.2, 
    color = "black"
    ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = plot_label),
    vjust = 3,
    size = 1.7,
    color = "black"
    ) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(name = "Literalität") +
  scale_y_reverse(
    breaks = 0:4,
    labels = c("Gesamt", "Geschlecht", "Migration", "Deutsch", "Elternschaft"),
    limits = c(4.1,-0.1)
    ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "Gruppen",
    title = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )

pdex

dev.off()

include_graphics(here("Results", "Fig2A_D_Deutsch.png"))

```

##### Num DE Labels

```{r}

agg_png(here("Results", "Fig2A_D_Num_Deutsch.png"), res = 576, width = 3200, height = 2250)

df_a2num_de_X <- df_a2num_de %>%
  mutate(plot_label = case_match(plot_label,
                                 "Male" ~ "Männer",
                                 "Female" ~ "Frauen",
                                 "Native-born" ~ "DE geboren",
                                 "Foreign-born" ~ "Ausl. geboren",
                                 "Native" ~ "Erstsprache",
                                 "Non-native" ~ "nicht Erstsprache",
                                 "Parent" ~ "Mit",
                                 "Childless" ~ "Ohne")
  )

pdex <- ggplot(df_a2num_de_X, aes(x = x, y = y, color = mean)) +
  geom_segment(
    data = edges_de,
    aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend),
    color = "grey75",
    linetype = "dotted"
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(mean, 0)), 
    vjust = -2.2, 
    size = 2.2, 
    color = "black"
    ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = plot_label),
    vjust = 3,
    size = 1.7,
    color = "black"
    ) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(name = "Numeralität") +
  scale_y_reverse(
    breaks = 0:4,
    labels = c("Gesamt", "Geschlecht", "Migration", "Deutsch", "Elternschaft"),
    limits = c(4.1,-0.1)
    ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "Gruppen",
    title = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )

pdex

dev.off()

include_graphics(here("Results", "Fig2A_D_Num_Deutsch.png"))

```
## Citations

```{r}

packages %>%
  map(citation) %>%
  print(style = "text")

```


## Colophon

```{r}

sessionInfo()

```
